description:
Offered: every semester
This course expands on Interviewing Techniques and supports learning in Assessment by providing practical experience in understanding and implementing intervention strategies. A special focus will be given to working with individuals and families, drawing from problem management approaches and addressing motivation-to-change issues in a generalist practice setting.
Prerequisite(s): HMSV 1100 , HMSV 2500 , and PSY 1200
Corequisite(s): HMSV 3610
